channel.title: Cybersecurity Threat Index
channel.description: Your comprehensive cybersecurity intelligence briefing. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins are available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.

item.title: Cybersecurity Threat Index — 2026-04-03 — Threat Level: 72% High
item.description:
Cybersecurity Threat Index Sponsored by QuantitativeGenius.com
Threat Level: 72% High (Orange)
Active exploitation of a Chrome zero-day plus sustained ransomware pressure and ongoing supply-chain compromise risk signals.
